title: rutidea tenuicaulis
intro: Rutidea tenuicaulis, also known as the slender Rutidea, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It is traditionally used in African folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, among others. Rutidea tenuicaulis is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and in some cases, the leaves and stems are used in traditional remedies.
